entry.title: Getting stream data using cds.RemoteService in CAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a question regarding reading stream data with CAP. I have this remote service endpoint, which should return a stream (Content-Type header is "application/octet-stream").

In CAP I am sending the request as follows:

const fs = require('fs');

let myRemoteService = await cds.connect.to('MY_REMOTE_SERVICE');

let response = await myRemoteService.send({
    method: 'GET',
    path: path,
    headers: headers
});

// specifying the encoding doesn't change anything (= file is never correct)
let b = Buffer.from(response);
fs.writeFileSync('myfile.ext', b);

The data I am getting back is always a UTF-8 encoded String and it does not have the correct data anymore (probably due to encoding). If I try to write the response to a file, I only get a corrupted file (as a string or buffer).

However, if I send the request in Postman and saved the response to a file, the content is still correct.

I also found out that I can get the correct content using Axios, if I specify the response to be a string.

const axios = require('axios');
const fs = require('fs');

...

this.on('func1', async req => {
  let r = axios({
    method: 'get',
    url: requestUrl,
    headers: headers,
    responseType: 'stream' // THIS IS THE KEY!
  })

  let res = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    let s = r.data;
    let b = [];

    s.on('data', data => {
      b.push(data);
    });

    s.on('end', () => {
      b = Buffer.concat(b);
      fs.writeFileSync('myfile.ext', b); // works
      resolve(b);
    });
  });

  return btoa(res);
});

I know that SAP Cloud SDK HTTP Client, which CAP internally uses, is based on Axios.

So my question is: Is there a way to specify the Axios request config, when sending requests in CAP.

Or is there any other way to get the data as a stream? 

Thank you very much.

Best regards,
Atakan

entry.title: Calling Integration Suite ODATA APIs from ODATA Receiver
entry.content:
I need some help in setting up the ODATA receiver channel to call some of the Integration Suite APIs (Partner Directory / Message Stores / Message Logs).  So if I take the Message Stores ODATA API for example...I have been able to successfully call this from Postman using the following URL

https://<my_host>.hana.ondemand.com/api/v1/DataStores(DataStoreName='myDataStore',IntegrationFlow='',Type='')/Entries

passing the token and authenticating with OATH 2.  When I call this from Postman I get a successful response containing XML data listing all the entries in "myDataStore".

However, when I try to call the same from the ODATA receiver, I am getting this error...

"An exception of type 'WstxUnexpectedCharException' occurred." ...

when trying to configure the connection in the receiver channel.  Here's the screenshot of the error.

I am using these credentials of type Oath 2 Client Credentials ...

Here's the config for the receiver channel...

I have tried playing around with setting headers and metadata request headers with no success.  I am not sure if this is the issue or if it is because of the credentials type that I am using.  Has someone done this already and if so, wat do I need to change to get this working?

entry.title: Standard SAP OData service. Get formatted document texts
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

how I can read Order or Quotation header or item texts via standard OData services like ....odata/sap/API_SALES_QUOTATION_SRV/A_SalesQuotationItemText(... and get back formatted text like in document and not as a string? 

Thank you.

entry.title: Assistance Required for Integrating local Application developped by asp.net with SAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Expert,
I'm seeking assistance with integrating our local application, which has been developed using Microsoft .NET, into SAP Cloud. 
I would like to leverage SAP’s cloud platform to enhance my application’s capabilities and streamline data sharing between the two systems. 
I would appreciate your guidance on the necessary steps and requirements for this integration.
Please let me know what information or actions are required from our side, and any specific documentation or support that we might need.
Thank you for your assistance


Kind regards
Saidi

entry.title: Service OData v4 - Republish service group
entry.content:
I've deleted an OData v4 standard service group on /IWFND/V4_ADMIN in order to republish it, but when I try to publish it again, I get the error message indicating:

"Selected service group not found or already published"

Any suggestion on how I can republish it?

entry.title: SAPUI5 PDFViewer Not Working : Underlying iframe was not found in DOM.
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm currently working on a SAPUI5 application that needs to display a PDF from the ABAP backend.

The OData Service is OK. Tests with Gateway Client are positive.
Just one point : I had to adapt the content-disposition to pass ‘inline’ instead of 'attachment' on ABAP system (SEGW)
>>> In order to display my PDF in the SAPUI5 application and no longer download it.

Now, I'm encountering another error in my SAPUI5 application
>>> FYI My SAPUI5 Version is "1.120.0"

The PDFViewer say "The PDF file could not be loaded."
And in the console I see the error message "Underlying iframe was not found in DOM."
My OData request is OK. The problem seems to be with my SAPUI5 application.

The code is relatively basic.
A PDFViewer on a view with setSource and setVisible, I also tried with Open method but same error.

I found the SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3429273/E but the properties "isTrustedSource" does not seem to be available with my version of SAPUI5 ("1.120.0").

I also tested my application with SAPUI5 version"1.120.20" on SAP BAS, In this case, I receive the message "Download the file to view it".
>>> Downloading works well, but that's not the purpose of the application.

How can I display the PDF content directly in the application?
In my case, downloading is not an option ...

Thanks in advance for your help.
YouriC

entry.title: SAP CPI Production Order Creation Fails Due to Invalid Time Format in OData Response
entry.content:
Hi team,

I'm working on a SAP CPI iFlow that creates production orders in SAP S4H, using the Production Order (Version 2) API.

I started by testing the connection between CPI and SAP, so I only have a Content Modifier with the payload and a Request Reply to connect to the OData adapter.

The payload is as follows:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<A_ProductionOrder_2>
<A_ProductionOrder_2Type>
<ManufacturingOrderType>ZP01</ManufacturingOrderType>
<Material>SG002</Material>
<ProductionPlant>3516</ProductionPlant>
<MRPController>001</MRPController>
<MfgOrderPlannedStartDate>2024-09-15T00:00:00</MfgOrderPlannedStartDate>
<MfgOrderPlannedStartTime>00:00:00</MfgOrderPlannedStartTime>
<MfgOrderPlannedEndDate>2024-09-16T00:00:00</MfgOrderPlannedEndDate>
<MfgOrderPlannedEndTime>00:00:00</MfgOrderPlannedEndTime>
<ProductionUnit>PC</ProductionUnit>
<TotalQuantity>10</TotalQuantity>
</A_ProductionOrder_2Type>
</A_ProductionOrder_2>

With this payload, I'm successfully creating production orders, so it doesn't seem like the payload is incorrect. However, CPI is always returning the following error:

com.sap.gateway.core.ip.processor.exception.ODataProcessingException: com.sap.gateway.core.ip.processor.exception.ODataProcessingException: Exception occurred in converting [class java.util.GregorianCalendar] with value [java.util.GregorianCalendar[time=?,areFieldsSet=false,areAllFieldsSet=false,lenient=false,zone=sun.util.calendar.ZoneInfo[id="Etc/UTC",offset=0,dstSavings=0,useDaylight=false,transitions=0,lastRule=null],firstDayOfWeek=1,minimalDaysInFirstWeek=1,ERA=?,YEAR=?,MONTH=?,WEEK_OF_YEAR=?,WEEK_OF_MONTH=?,DAY_OF_MONTH=?,DAY_OF_YEAR=?,DAY_OF_WEEK=?,DAY_OF_WEEK_IN_MONTH=?,AM_PM=?,HOUR=?,HOUR_OF_DAY=24,MINUTE=0,SECOND=0,MILLISECOND=?,ZONE_OFFSET=?,DST_OFFSET=?]] to String., cause: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: HOUR_OF_DAY

I believe the issue is related to two tags in the Request Reply response: MfgOrderPlannedEndTime and MfgOrderScheduledEndTime, with the value PT24H00M00S. It seems that java.util.GregorianCalendar only accepts hours in the range of 0-23, but according to SAP documentation, the hour 24:00 is allowed (which seems incorrect to me).

I'm struggling to find a solution for this issue, as it seems to be a very basic error.

Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: in Odata metadata not loaded it is not activating
entry.content: in Service is not registering due to metadata not loaded error is showing what is solution for this?

entry.title: Error on OData v4 when choosing GridTable
entry.content:
Hello all

When I choose a new column in list report, I get this message:

I am using a V4 service and this happens only, when I choose table type GridTable in VSCode. On V2 it works...
Does anybody know why this happens?

Kind regards

entry.title: Currency Exchange Rate Integration to S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently trying to find a solution to integrate currency exchange rates from the European Central Bank (ECB) into SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud with Integration Suite (using an API). I wonder if this is possible without using other additional BTP services such as SAP Market Rates Management (BYOR or similar). For example, is it possible to build an integration to import the values to the Currency Exchange Rates app or Import Foreign Exchange Rates app? Maybe building some sort of CDS view, app or similar in S4HC that can fetch the Exchange Rates through an API?

We are not looking for the most efficient way to do this, just to see the opportunity, if it's even possible to get the data into S4HC without using any other additional services than Integration Suite.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: oData Parameters edm.DateTime -> initial / emptyValues ?
entry.content:
Hello,

we have created a SAP BW4 Query as oData.
The oData-Service is propagated correctly. Due to our authorization concept, we need to "preFilter" the results using the parameters. e.g.
..../sap/opu/odata/sap/<servicename>_SRV/<servicename>(ZVKORG='1111',ZCOUNTRY='DE',....)/Results?$select=.......

Now we have aQuery-Variable ref. to 0DATE (e.g. CreatedOn). The generated oData-service has the edm-type dateTime, non-mandatory.

Now some datasets have no value for CreatedOn, so it is initial. in DB 000000.
While using this preFiltering we have to input a valid DateTime in URL-Call, e.g:
Z_CREATEDON=datetime'0001-01-01T00:00:00',Z_CREATEDONTo=datetime'9999-12-31T23:59:59'

How should the call look like, when i want to get all data? With all i mean, also all datasets which have a initial mentioned date.

Thx in advanced

entry.title: SAP MDK - How to access object information from a Card Collection?
entry.content:
Hello community !

I have an MDK application which on the home page has a Card Collection:



When you click on one of the cards, navigation to a details page is activated:

But when I get to this screen, I see everything empty:

How can I access the object I select? Is there a way to send the object ID between views and access specific information about a particular object? In the detail view I am using "Key Value Item" type controls.

Navigation is simple, I don't know if I need to configure something extra here:

Thanks for your help !

entry.title: ODP ODATA Skip Token and Delta Token issue
entry.content:
Hi community, 

we've created a ODP select for a large table and want to provide an ODATA endpoint to the external systems. 

Since the table has a few hundreds of thousend records we activated paging. 

The issue is: 

In order to test it we need to do request by request with the skip tokens provided in the response. 
Only when we invoke the service with the last skip token, we get the delta token in the response body. 

Question: 

Is there any way to work with the delta token from the beginning. 
Szenario is, that the service consumer does not want to retrieve the whole table request by request with the skip tokens first. Instead of that they want to retrieve the delta only. 


Thanks for any advice.

entry.title: SAP MDK - How do I filter items in a list of items?
entry.content:
Hello community! I'll tell you what I want to achieve. I have this list of "Areas" in a "Simple Property Collection"

Each area has a list of certain teams associated with it, these teams must be filtered by the ID of the Area entered, because each area has different teams (Equipos).

I have a navigation called "NavTo_Equipos.action"

This is my "Equipo" page, I thought it would automatically filter the teams according to their areas but it didn't.

For each area it shows me the same complete list of equipment. And this is wrong.

I also tried setting up this filter but it didn't work. This way it shows me absolutely nothing.

What am I doing wrong? I am attaching this just in case how the relationship was presented in my CAP service.

entity AREA : cuid, AUDITORIA, ACTIVO {
    EMPRESA : Association to one EMPRESA;
    DESCRIPCION : String100;
    DESCRIPCIONCONCATENADA : String5000;
    AREANIVEL : Association to one AREANIVEL;
    CODIGOSAP : String;
    ACTIVOSAP : Boolean;
    EQUIPOS : Association to many EQUIPO on EQUIPOS.AREA = $self;
}

entity EQUIPO : cuid, AUDITORIA, ACTIVO {
    DESCRIPCION : String100;
    AREA : Association to one AREA;
    SECTOR : Association to one SECTOR;
    LIDER : Association to one PERSONA;
    COORDINADORCORPORATIVO : Association to one PERSONA;
    COORDINADORGENERAL : Association to one PERSONA;
}

Thanks for the help

entry.title: HANA XSA Odata setup for consuming the XSA Calculation views
entry.content:

My team is trying to set up "HANA XSA Odata for consuming the XSA Calculation views",

We are trying to do the same in the Webide. This API will be consumed by the middleware team for B2B consumption.

Please point me step by step on how to XSA Odata in Webide.

 

Thanks,

Shanthi

entry.title: Fiori Object Page Items Table - How to add totals?
entry.content:
Hello,

I created an Odata model based on a custom CDS view, my behavior is managed with unmanaged save, and in BAS i created a list report page with object page that have a table with items.
How can I display total values in that table?

Thanks,
Ines Martins

entry.title: ETag handling in UI5
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I am working with an SAP OData V4 API that uses ETags as an optimistic locking approach. 

I have bound the data to a table but when I change the data and want to update it through the API, no ETag is set in the HTTP request resulting in a 412 error and failing requests. 

I have not found any setting options for this on the model and also no way to set the ETag manually. The only option I have found so far is to completely ignore the ETag (setting a fixed If-Match: * header) and therefore undermining the locking approach.

I can't imagine that ETag handling isn't possible here. Has anyone had any experience with this and can explain to me what needs to be done?

entry.title: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST in SAP Gateway Client
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to make a sample of POST data in SEGW that call a BAPI. I follow this tutorial step by step:

Step-by-step Creation of sales order using BAPI in... - SAP Community

However, when I try to POST through SAP Gateway Client, there is error 405 Method Not Allowed. I already tried some solutions including tick Creatable, Updatable in Entity Properties but the error 405 persists.
I also try to create another SEGW project that call a simple BAPI to insert data to my ZTable, but
The similar error 405 also happens

HTTP Status Code : 405
Error Text : The specified HTTP method is not allowed for the resource identified by the Data Service Request URI
T100 Error ID : /IWFND/CM_CONSUMER122

I also make other SEGW sample project to GET data from a BAPI as well, it works well and everything is okay. The problem only happens when I POST data to a BAPI create.
Is there any solution for this error? Is is related to networking setting/configuration?

entry.title: Retrieve remaining quantity of product
entry.content:
I would like to retrieve remaining quantity of product from s4hana system using odata services.

Is there any API that we can use to get remaining quantity?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: SAP CAP - How to set HasStream="true" in a Entity or Service with OData CDS?
entry.content: I need to set this property in my entity because my SAP MDK application consumes the metadata generated by SAP CAP service and I need to create a media action, but I must have this property and I don't know how to set it.
